text:
Hi, I tried installing gnustep to get the obj c compiler working but when I tried
make install

It errored with various errors. I detailed all my steps in the freebsd forum thread

 How to compile Objective-C in FreeBSD

May you please investigate and resolve this issue?

Fix: 

I could not.
How-To-Repeat: Please visit the forum discussion:
